text:
# Teradata Migration  
Nationwide - IBM Gen AI Demo 2025  
logo  
Harnessing AI to streamline code and data migration for accelerated timelines and superior business outcomes.Achieving unprecedented efficiency in complex Teradata migration by accelerating processes with GENAI Copilot.  
Monumental Migration Challenge  
Migrating a massive Teradata environment posed significant cost and technical limitations to modernization efforts.  
Aggressive Timeline Constraints  
The migration had a 60–70% shorter timeline than industry standards due to contractual demands.  
Comprehensive Migration Scope  
The project included code conversion, data hydration into a modern Data Lakehouse, and system repointing.  
Innovative Technical Solutions  
Advanced expertise and innovative methods ensured quality delivery within a complex, condensed timeline.  
| Migration Component                | Details                                    |
|------------------------------------|--------------------------------------------|
| Data Volume                        | 50+ TB                                     |
| Stored Procedures                  | ~ 700 Procedures  (2.5+ Mil Lines of Code) |
| Complex Views                      | ~ 6500Views                                |
| Users                              | XXX+ Users                                 |
| Reports                            | ~ 300 Reports                              |
| Downstream Applications + Extracts | ~ 700 Applications                         |  
| Phase        | Time Reduction   |
|--------------|------------------|
| Analysis     | 25%              |
| Design       | 30%              |
| Conversion   | 60%              |
| User Testing | 20%              |  
IBM & Nationwide – Gen AI Demo
name: Chunk 7/14

raw_entities.name: Nationwide
raw_entities.description: A major financial services organization that engaged IBM to execute a large-scale Teradata migration. The client faced significant contractual timeline pressures and required modernization of a massive legacy data environment to meet business objectives.

raw_entities.name: GENAI Copilot
raw_entities.description: An AI-powered acceleration platform utilized to streamline code and data migration processes. It enables rapid transformation of legacy systems into modern data architectures, significantly reducing project timelines and improving delivery quality through automated assistance.
context: Achieving unprecedented efficiency in complex Teradata migration by accelerating processes with GENAI Copilot.

raw_entities.name: AI-Driven Code and Data Migration
raw_entities.description: The core technical capability of converting legacy code, hydrating data into modern architectures, and repointing downstream systems. This capability leverages AI to automate complex transformations and ensure seamless integration into a Data Lakehouse environment while maintaining operational continuity.
context: code conversion, data hydration into a modern Data Lakehouse, and system repointing

raw_entities.name: Teradata Modernization
raw_entities.description: The application of AI-driven migration capabilities to modernize a massive Teradata environment. This use case focuses on replacing legacy data infrastructure with a modern Data Lakehouse while maintaining operational continuity and meeting strict contractual deadlines.
context: Migrating a massive Teradata environment posed significant cost and technical limitations to modernization efforts.

raw_entities.name: Accelerated Project Timelines
raw_entities.description: Significant reduction in project duration across all migration phases, achieving a 60-70% shorter timeline than industry standards. Specific phase reductions include 25% in analysis, 30% in design, 60% in conversion, and 20% in user testing, delivering faster time-to-value and meeting aggressive contractual demands.
context: 60–70% shorter timeline than industry standards due to contractual demands.
Time Reduction: Analysis 25%, Design 30%, Conversion 60%, User Testing 20%

raw_entities.name: Unprecedented Operational Efficiency
raw_entities.description: Delivers exceptional process efficiency and superior business outcomes by leveraging AI to automate and optimize complex migration workflows. This efficiency gain reduces manual effort, accelerates delivery, and ensures high-quality results within a compressed schedule.
context: Achieving unprecedented efficiency in complex Teradata migration

raw_entities.name: Massive Teradata Environment Scale
raw_entities.description: The client faced a highly complex and large-scale legacy data environment that posed significant cost and technical limitations. Migrating this massive Teradata setup required overcoming substantial architectural and operational hurdles to successfully modernize the infrastructure.
context: Migrating a massive Teradata environment posed significant cost and technical limitations to modernization efforts.

raw_entities.name: Aggressive Contractual Timeline
raw_entities.description: Strict contractual demands required a migration timeline 60-70% shorter than industry standards. This aggressive schedule created significant pressure to deliver complex code and data transformations without compromising quality or accuracy.
context: The migration had a 60–70% shorter timeline than industry standards due to contractual demands.

raw_entities.name: Teradata
raw_entities.description: A large-scale legacy data warehouse platform hosting over 50 TB of data, 700 stored procedures, 6,500 complex views, and hundreds of reports. The system served as the primary target for modernization and migration to a modern data architecture.

raw_entities.name: Data Lakehouse
raw_entities.description: A modern data architecture designed to replace the legacy Teradata environment. It serves as the destination for hydrated data, enabling scalable storage and advanced analytics capabilities for downstream applications and reporting.
context: data hydration into a modern Data Lakehouse

raw_entities.name: AI-Powered Migration Acceleration
raw_entities.description: The use of advanced AI capabilities to drastically compress migration timelines while maintaining high-quality delivery. This differentiator combines proprietary AI tools with deep domain expertise to solve complex technical challenges faster than traditional manual methods.
context: Advanced expertise and innovative methods ensured quality delivery within a complex, condensed timeline.

raw_entities.name: IBM
raw_entities.description: The primary technology vendor and solution provider delivering the Gen AI Copilot platform and migration services. IBM leveraged its advanced AI expertise and innovative methodologies to execute the complex migration for Nationwide.

raw_entities.name: IBM Gen AI Demo 2025
raw_entities.description: A 2025 demonstration event showcasing IBM's Gen AI Copilot capabilities applied to a real-world Teradata migration project. The event highlighted the successful delivery of accelerated timelines and superior business outcomes for the client.
